name: Ohio COVID Outbreaks
description: In Ohio, a respiratory outbreak is defined as two or more epidemiologically linked cases of the same illness (e.g., COVID-19, flu, or RSV) occurring within a 7-day period in a shared setting (e.g., school, workplace, healthcare, congregate living).
